rationale: The report is likely a standard/global report; switching to the Global tab should reveal it within the View/Run list.
Viewing “All” reports broadens the list beyond “My reports,” increasing the chance of finding the target report.

action_text: Type "Incidents by agent" into the list search field
rationale: Filtering within the list by the report title directly is the most precise way to locate the needed report on this page.

action_text: Toggle the Show/Hide filter for the report list
rationale: Using the list filter builder allows setting a condition like Title contains “Incidents by agent,” ensuring accurate results.
The list may contain more rows below; scrolling can reveal additional reports if the target isn’t initially visible.
